title: BEM-1248 unified capture
objective:
Create file governance/runtime/unified_validation_capture_runner.py with content import json
import subprocess
import sys
from pathlib import Path

TARGETS = [
    "governance/validators/run_bem931_validator_suite.py",
    "governance/tests/run_bem931_runner_hardening_tests.py",
    "governance/tests/run_managed_channel_negative_tests.py",
    "governance/tests/run_lifecycle_transition_tests.py",
    "governance/tests/run_provider_policy_fixture_tests.py",
    "governance/tests/run_bem931_mock_e2e.py",
]


def run(output_path="governance/runtime/BEM1248_UNIFIED_VALIDATION_CAPTURE_RESULT.json"):
    results = []
    for target in TARGETS:
        proc = subprocess.run([sys.executable, target], text=True, capture_output=True)
        results.append({"target": target, "returncode": proc.returncode, "stdout": proc.stdout.strip(), "stderr": proc.stderr.strip(), "ok": proc.returncode == 0})
    record = {"bem_id": "BEM-1248", "release_pass": False, "unified_capture": True, "ok": all(item["ok"] for item in results), "results": results}
    Path(output_path).parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    Path(output_path).write_text(json.dumps(record, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding="utf-8")
    return record

if __name__ == "__main__":
    result = run()
    print(json.dumps(result, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))
    raise SystemExit(0 if result.get("ok") else 1)
